summary: Comprehensive testing of King Choreography Next.js migration completed. All 22 backend API tests pass. Frontend tests pass. Fixed 1 bug in free submissions route (missing service_type field). All API routes work through the FastAPI proxy to Next.js correctly.

issues: Dev tools indicator '1 issue' badge in bottom-left corner - Next.js dev mode warning, not visible in production

passed_tests: POST /api/applications creates application with status 'new' and submitted_at
POST /api/submissions with review_feedback service: $150 for client, $250 for non-client
POST /api/calculate-price returns correct pricing (5 athletes x $40 = $200 for virtual_upgrade)
POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
GET /api/admin/queue (with token) returns week info and submissions
Homepage renders correctly with navigation and CTAs
Submit page loads 3 virtual services and multi-step funnel works
Admin login works and dashboard loads stats
Apply form loads with all required fields
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: /app/frontend/app/api/submissions/free/route.ts was missing service_type field - added service_type: 'free_tier' to fix Supabase not-null constraint error
API routes properly filter unknown fields via Supabase strict mode - test payloads should only include valid schema fields
Supabase 'applications' table has check constraint on timeframe field - valid values are 'asap', 'next_season' (not 'next_month')
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix: applications, submissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend API endpoints tested via pytest. FastAPI on port 8001 acts as reverse proxy to Next.js on port 3000. All business logic is in Next.js API routes. Supabase database constraints: applications.timeframe only accepts 'asap' or 'next_season'. submissions.service_type is NOT NULL. PayPal and Email (Resend) are MOCKED. Use schema-compatible field names: 'full_name' for submissions, 'contact_name' for applications, 'additional_notes' not 'notes'.

mocked_apis.note: PayPal integration is MOCKED (returns fake order_id/txn_id). Email service (Resend) is MOCKED (console.log only). All other APIs are real Supabase calls.

bug_fixed.issue: Missing service_type field caused Supabase POST to fail with 400 (not-null constraint violation)
bug_fixed.fix: Added service_type: 'free_tier' to the data object before supabasePost
